rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel- Civil

rulings.Case Title: NANCY WATSON et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel - Civil
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, APRIL 6, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30AM, LINE 2. PLAINTIFFS NANCY WATSON, FRED WATSON, MARK WATSON, ANTHONY WATSON, AND KIMBERLY HATHAWAY'S COUNSEL'S Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel is granted. A hearing is required unless plaintiffs¿ counsel advises each of the plaintiffs of the tentative ruling and each of them state that he or she does not intend to contest the tentative ruling. = (220/HEK)
